claim_boundary: Stage-1 schema and admission evidence for N=30-40 tensor-network crossover rows only; no N=30-40 solver row, hardware advantage, tensor-network hardness, or broad quantum-advantage claim is established.

gates.blocker: target sizes must all exceed the 16-node exact-simulation boundary
row schema is missing required provenance or TN diagnostic fields
design must not promote broad advantage or imply measured N=30-40 rows

owner_gated_followups: execute N=30-40 CPU-first quimb rows with isolated host metadata
promote or skip GPU tensor-network rows only through the owner-gated GPU lane
add maintained Julia/ITensor parity only after Julia toolchain ownership exists

row_schema.claim_boundary: Stage-1 schema and admission evidence for N=30-40 tensor-network crossover rows only; no N=30-40 solver row, hardware advantage, tensor-network hardness, or broad quantum-advantage claim is established.
